3148400.name: Sky Scaffold
3148400.description:
In the far future, humanity has scattered to the stars. It falls to you to tame the wild frontier of space through industry and automation. Start with a single barren planet and transform it into a thriving, habitable world.

TERRAFORM & BUILD
Sky Scaffold is a semi-idle, incremental factory and colony-building game. Drill for raw resources, manufacture components, and design sprawling production lines to create a breathable atmosphere and a living planet. Defend your growing settlement from the many threats lurking in the cosmos.

REACH FOR THE STARS
Your ultimate project begins: constructing the Sky Scaffold. Build a tower that scrapes the sky, eventually becoming a fully-fledged space elevator. This is your gateway to the next frontier. Build a space hub and open up trade.

EXPAND YOUR EMPIRE
With your foothold in space secured, expand your operations. Set up orbital industry, mine asteroids for rare materials, and discover new solar systems with unique planets to terraform. Each new world offers new challenges and opportunities.

Your galactic empire awaits.
3148400.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
